summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed in Settings.tsx with DEFAULT_EMERGENCY_NAME and DEFAULT_EMERGENCY_PHONE constants set to 'Aditya Patel' and '9546530546'. REQ-2 is addressed in backend/main.mo with the default emergencyContact initialized to those values, and a migration module handles existing null contacts. REQ-3 is addressed in Home.tsx with prominent display of the contact and a CALL NOW button using tel: protocol, with Hindi messaging for girls, boys, and children in trouble.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle schema migration from optional to non-optional emergencyContact
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 only requested that the backend default be initialized to 'Aditya Patel'/'9546530546' without overwriting existing contacts. A full migration module was not requested, though it may serve the requirement's intent.

hallucinated_features.description: SEO enhancements including robots.txt, sitemap.xml, structured JSON-LD data, Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags
hallucinated_features.reason: None of the three requirements mention SEO improvements or search engine optimization.

hallucinated_features.description: Hindi language messaging on the Home page such as 'Musibat Mein Hain?', 'ABHI CALL KAREIN', 'Ladkiyan', 'Ladke', 'Bachche'
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 specifies the page should communicate it is for anyone in trouble but does not specify Hindi language. This is an implementation choice beyond what was explicitly requested.
